title: David Armstrong (Wisconsin politician)
extract: David Bruce Armstrong (born October 3, 1961) is an American businessman and Republican politician from Barron County, Wisconsin.  He is a member of the Wisconsin State Assembly, representing Wisconsin's 67th Assembly district since 2025; he previously represented the 75th Assembly district from 2021 to 2025.  Earlier, he served as a member of the city council of Rice Lake, Wisconsin.
